page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Original Screen Saver (PS1)
text:
is a screensaver made for the . 

It was created as a promotional event for the Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden game with only 1000 copies given away at a write in lottery.

Gameplay

If one loads up the disc, it has one slideshow containing about 10 pictures from the game and three variations of the same screensaver (blocks with faces that swoosh in): https://www.reddit.com/r/evangelion/comments/9eam10/finally_got_my_hands_on_the_evangelion/ 

Shinji and Mana
Shinji and Asuka
Whole cast
